text:
BBC fanshave been outraged over the coverage of the2024 Olympicsover in Paris. Taking their complaints online, fans have fumed that they are missing out on seeing certain sporting events, with thembashing the broadcaster for their scheduling.

Today's programming, onBBCOne, should include coverage of the first three gymnastics apparatus finals of the day and the women's singles in the badminton competition. Meanwhile, posting to X (formerlyTwitter), one fan told of their seemingly confusing ordeal for trying to watch the competition's tennis final.

They wrote: "I open BBC iplayer to watch the tennis final. I choose the tennis option. 'Now we want to show you the shooting. You can watch the tennis on BBC1' I come out, channels, BBC1. Tennis.

"5 minutes later 'We are now going to the gymnastics, you can watch the tennis on the app' WTAF [crying laughing emoji]".

Another social media user added: "@DawnLoweActress @BBCSport @DjokerNole Typical BBC - and then you have 3 bbc commentators commentating on the same piece of apparatus at the gymnastics and someone in the studio endlessly discussing the same thing - and I'm paying for it - Grrrrrrr !"

READ MORE:Team GB Olympian cries live on BBC and apologises for devastating failure



Someone else seemed to be annoyed about missing out on particular sports, writing: "When there is gymnastics and climbing going on bbc are showing badminton and table tennis", with another adding: "BBCneeds to get it together. Showing gymnastics and table tennis when athletics going on. Thank God for discovery+".

"@gbrgymfan Which is exactly why I have a Discovery+ subscription! Don't trustBBCcoverage," another person agreed in frustration.

Team GB are trying to pull themselves higher up the league table rankings todaywith the British quartet take part in the triathlonn mixed relay, while Keely Hodgkinson will compete in the 800 metre final tonight. So far the team have managed to bag an impressive 10 gold medals. They have also secured 12 silver and 16 bronze, placing them sixth overall.

Don't miss:BBC Olympics host admits 'I'm going to get in trouble for this' after gesture

Don't miss:BBC responds to Olympics complaints after 'extremely disrespectful' live scene

Don't miss:Amber Rutter breaks silence after Team GB skeet shooter 'robbed' at Olympics



Unfortunately, fans at home can't watch every event as theBBChad to change the way it covers the Olympics after Warner Bros Discovery (WBD) bought the European TV rights back in 2015.

A deal between theBBCand WBD states it can show 250 hours of live coverage on TV and through a broadcast stream – translating to only show two events happening live at the same time.

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

The deal took effect for the 2021 Tokyo Olympics and will be in place until 2032 - up to and including the Summer Games in Brisbane.

title: Olympics 2024 fans 'switch off' as they all have same BBC coverage complaint | TV & Radio | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Gemma Jones
description: Sports lovers who have tuned in to watch the 2024 Olympics on BBC have been less than impressed with the coverage in Paris.
